scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/shared build && concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/client dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/server dev"
scripts.dev:client: corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/client dev
scripts.dev:server: corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/server dev
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/client build && corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/server build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @coop-game/shared build && tsc -p apps/client/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit
